channel.title: OTLP on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in OTLP on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Ingest OTLP signals into Azure Monitor with the OpenTelemetry Collector
item.description:
Azure Monitor now generally supports native ingestion of OTLP signals. OpenTelemetry-instrumented applications and platforms can send telemetry directly to Azure Monitor.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Monitor supports native OTLP ingestion using the Azure Monitor Agent
item.description:
Azure Monitor now has public preview support for native OTLP ingestion through the Azure Monitor Agent (AMA). OpenTelemetry-instrumented applications can send telemetry directly to AMA, which exports it to Azure Monitor.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Ingest OTLP data into Azure Monitor with the OpenTelemetry Collector
item.description:
Azure Monitor now has public preview support for native OTLP ingestion. You can send telemetry from OpenTelemetry-instrumented apps and platforms directly to Azure Monitor using the OpenTelemetry Collector.

  • Source: Azure Updates
